name: zech-plugins
description: Statusline and productivity plugins for Claude Code: live plugin chips, a plan/context usage meter, and a text-to-diagram tool.

plugins.name: live-plugins
plugins.description: List installed plugins (/plugins-live) and show the live ones as colored [CHIP] tags in the statusline.

plugins.name: token-meter
plugins.description: Live statusline meter: 5-hour plan usage + context window + cost, with the live-plugins chip row.

plugins.name: diagrammer
plugins.description: Draw use-case, control-flow, and data-flow diagrams from plain text via Mermaid, PlantUML, and Graphviz.
